operational_knowledge_units.title: Map Monitor Quick Select provides map visibility and object selection options
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Map Monitor Quick Select area includes options to view all AGV active paths, view Station IDs, view Charger IDs, and select robots, containers, cells, and chargers.
observed_evidence: Visible bullets: 'View all AGV active paths', 'View Station Ids', 'View Charger Ids'
Visible bullets: 'Robot Selection', 'Container Selection', 'Cell Selection', 'Charger Selection'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Map Monitor Quick Select UI reference. Quick Select supports viewing all AGV active paths, viewing Station IDs, viewing Charger IDs, and selection of robots, containers, cells, and chargers.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Use Map Monitor Quick Select options
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide lists Quick Select functions in Map Monitor, including path and ID visibility plus object selection types.

steps.instruction: Open or view the Map Monitor Quick Select area.
steps.validation_check: Options listed in the Quick Select area can be seen.
steps.visual_region_hint: Map Monitor Quick Select list area

steps.instruction: Use the available Quick Select options to view AGV active paths, Station IDs, or Charger IDs, or to select a robot, container, cell, or charger as needed.
steps.expected_outcome: The requested view or selection option is used from Quick Select.
steps.validation_check: The desired Quick Select option is present in the interface.
steps.visual_region_hint: Bullet list describing Quick Select functions

warnings: The slide identifies available Quick Select functions but does not show exact click sequence or UI controls.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Navigation candidate for Map Monitor Quick Select. The slide shows that Quick Select can be used to view AGV active paths, Station IDs, Charger IDs, and to select robots, containers, cells, and chargers, but it does not provide exact UI interaction details.
